results.label: Integration: Pipeline
results.stdout:
▶ Integration: vocab-10k.js ↔ sign-mapper.js SIGNS
  ✔ every VOCAB_EXT value resolves to a real sign config at runtime (1.479ms)

▶ Integration: Stemmer → WORD_TO_SIGN → VOCAB_EXT fallback chain
  ✔ step 1 — direct WORD_TO_SIGN hit skips stemmer (0.1234ms)
  ✔ step 2 — stemmer finds root in WORD_TO_SIGN (studying → study → STUDY) (0.0779ms)
  ✔ step 3 — vocab-10k word resolves to THINK sign (0.0716ms)
  ✔ step 4 — POS fallback when nothing found (adjective suffix → __MODIFIER) (0.2463ms)
  ✔ step 5 — fingerspell as final fallback for truly unknown words (0.2829ms)
✔ Integration: Stemmer → WORD_TO_SIGN → VOCAB_EXT fallback chain (0.9884ms)
▶ Integration: grammar reordering + expression marking
  ✔ WH-question: "what" moved to end AND expression = WH_QUESTION (0.1639ms)
  ✔ time word moves to front AND sentence still produces all signs (0.1897ms)
  ✔ mixed sentence: time + WH + regular words all produce signs (0.1001ms)
✔ Integration: grammar reordering + expression marking (0.5713ms)
▶ Integration: multi-word phrase detection
  ✔ "thank you" → single THANK_YOU sign (not two separate signs) (0.0704ms)
  ✔ "my name" → single NAME sign (phrase takes priority) (0.0646ms)
  ✔ longer sentence preserves phrase detection in context (0.1801ms)
✔ Integration: multi-word phrase detection (0.4021ms)

  ✔ "Zoom lecture — professor introduces topic" (0.1724ms)

✔ Integration: real caption scenarios (0.4698ms)

  ✔ sign-mapper did not overwrite VOCAB_EXT (0.2104ms)
✔ Integration: shared window.SignBridge namespace (0.3763ms)
